narrative:
Mohican-Combined township has 1,330 registered voters, with 48.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.8 percentage points.
